nasb.text: Moses recorded their starting places according to their journeys by the command of the Lord, and these are their journeys according to their starting places.

esv.text: Moses wrote down their starting places, stage by stage, by command of the Lord, and these are their stages according to their starting places.

cnv.text: 摩西照著耶和華的命令，把他們出發的路程記下來，他們出發的路程是這樣：

ccb.text: 摩西遵照耶和华的吩咐记录启行的地点，以下是他们停留过的地方。
